_comment: CME exchange + clearing + NFA fee per side, by futures root. Snapshot estimate (mid-2026). A171 expanded coverage: CBOT treasuries/grains, remaining FX majors, micro metals/yields/crypto. notMicro pins full-size roots whose ticker starts with M (MGEX wheat) so the tier heuristic can't misprice them. Edit values here, then run scripts/build-manifest.mjs to refresh the cache-busting hash.
